testcase.name: run_01_authenticated_bnpl_requires_installment_choice_before_confirmation_and_then_succeeds
testcase.system-out:
• Playwright pages after init: 1 ▶ Authenticated payment method preconditions ▶ Clear browser session ✅ PASS: Session cleared ✅ PASS: Ready ▶ Open URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/auth/register • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/auth/register • Playwright pages after open: 1 ✅ PASS: Opened ▶ Type into element: First name • locator=input[data-test='first-name'] • value=John ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Last name • locator=input[data-test='last-name'] • value=Doe ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Date of Birth • locator=input[data-test='dob'] • value=1990-01-01 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Phone • locator=input[data-test='phone'] • value=0712345678 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Email address • locator=input[data-test='email'] • value=user_ptpvwslix2@example.com ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Password • locator=input[data-test='password'] • value=Aa1@sMYZBy7x ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Select option: Country • locator=select[data-test='country'] • value=RO ✅ PASS: Selected ▶ Type into element: Postal code • locator=input[data-test='postal_code'] • value=10001 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: House number • locator=input[data-test='house_number'] • value=5 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Street • locator=input[data-test='street'] • value=Main Street 1 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: City • locator=input[data-test='city'] • value=Bucharest ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: State • locator=input[data-test='state'] • value=B ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Click on: Register • locator=button[data-test='register-submit'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Navigate to URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/auth/login • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/auth/login • Playwright pages after open: 1 • Wait for URL contains: /auth/login ✅ PASS: Navigated ▶ Type into element: Email address • locator=input[data-test='email'] • value=user_ptpvwslix2@example.com ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Password • locator=input[data-test='password'] • value=Aa1@sMYZBy7x ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Click on: Login • locator=input[data-test='login-submit'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Navigate to URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/ • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/ • Playwright pages after open: 1 • Wait for URL contains: / ✅ PASS: Navigated ▶ Click visible match on: First storefront product • locator=a[data-test^='product-'] • visibleIndex=1 ✅ PASS: Clicked visible match ▶ Click on: Add to cart • locator=button[data-test='add-to-cart'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Get text from: body • locator=body • text=View the Documentation for this application. Practice Black Box Testing & Bug Hunting Testing Guide 🐛 Bug Hunting Home Categories Contact John Doe EN Photo by Helinton Fantin on Unsplash. Combination Pliers
PliersForgeFlex Tools
$14.15 A B C D E
Versatile combination pliers designed for gripping, bending, and cutting wire with ease. Featuring chrome vanadium steel construction with induction-hardened cutting edges, these pliers deliver excellent grip and leverage for a wide range of tasks. The precision-machined jaws combine flat gripping surfaces with a pipe-grip section and integrated wire cutter for true multi-purpose functionality. Ergonomic bi-component handles reduce hand fatigue during extended use and provide a secure hold even with oily or gloved hands. The joint is precisely fitted to eliminate play and ensure smooth operation over thousands of cycles. Ideal for electricians, mechanics, and DIY enthusiasts tackling everyday projects around the workshop or job site.
Quantity Add to cart Add to favourites Compare Specifications Handle Material Bi-component Length 200mm Material Chrome Vanadium Steel Warranty 2years Weight 340g Related products Pliers More information Bolt Cutters More information Long Nose Pliers More information Slip Joint Pliers More information

Payment success message • locator=div[data-test='payment-success-message'] • text=Payment was successful ✅ PASS: Text captured
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details.

Featuring chrome vanadium steel construction with induction-hardened cutting edges, these pliers deliver excellent grip and leverage for a wide range of tasks. The precision-machined jaws combine flat gripping surfaces with a pipe-grip section and integrated wire cutter for true multi-purpose functionality. Ergonomic bi-component handles reduce hand fatigue during extended use and provide a secure hold even with oily or gloved hands. The joint is precisely fitted to eliminate play and ensure smooth operation over thousands of cycles. Ideal for electricians, mechanics, and DIY enthusiasts tackling everyday projects around the workshop or job site.

PliersForgeFlex Tools
$14.15 A B C D E
Versatile combination pliers designed for gripping, bending, and cutting wire with ease. Featuring chrome vanadium steel construction with induction-hardened cutting edges, these pliers deliver excellent grip and leverage for a wide range of tasks. The precision-machined jaws combine flat gripping surfaces with a pipe-grip section and integrated wire cutter for true multi-purpose functionality. Ergonomic bi-component handles reduce hand fatigue during extended use and provide a secure hold even with oily or gloved hands. The joint is precisely fitted to eliminate play and ensure smooth operation over thousands of cycles. Ideal for electricians, mechanics, and DIY enthusiasts tackling everyday projects around the workshop or job site.

Ergonomic bi-component handles reduce hand fatigue during extended use and provide a secure hold even with oily or gloved hands. The joint is precisely fitted to eliminate play and ensure smooth operation over thousands of cycles. Ideal for electricians, mechanics, and DIY enthusiasts tackling everyday projects around the workshop or job site.

Practice Black Box Testing & Bug Hunting Testing Guide 🐛 Bug Hunting Home Categories Contact John Doe EN Photo by Helinton Fantin on Unsplash. Combination Pliers
PliersForgeFlex Tools
$14.15 A B C D E
Versatile combination pliers designed for gripping, bending, and cutting wire with ease. Featuring chrome vanadium steel construction with induction-hardened cutting edges, these pliers deliver excellent grip and leverage for a wide range of tasks. The precision-machined jaws combine flat gripping surfaces with a pipe-grip section and integrated wire cutter for true multi-purpose functionality. Ergonomic bi-component handles reduce hand fatigue during extended use and provide a secure hold even with oily or gloved hands. The joint is precisely fitted to eliminate play and ensure smooth operation over thousands of cycles. Ideal for electricians, mechanics, and DIY enthusiasts tackling everyday projects around the workshop or job site.
Quantity Add to cart Add to favourites Compare Specifications Handle Material Bi-component Length 200mm Material Chrome Vanadium Steel Warranty 2years Weight 340g Related products Pliers More information Bolt Cutters More information Long Nose Pliers More information Slip Joint Pliers More information

PliersForgeFlex Tools
$14.15 A B C D E
Versatile combination pliers designed for gripping, bending, and cutting wire with ease. Featuring chrome vanadium steel construction with induction-hardened cutting edges, these pliers deliver excellent grip and leverage for a wide range of tasks. The precision-machined jaws combine flat gripping surfaces with a pipe-grip section and integrated wire cutter for true multi-purpose functionality. Ergonomic bi-component handles reduce hand fatigue during extended use and provide a secure hold even with oily or gloved hands. The joint is precisely fitted to eliminate play and ensure smooth operation over thousands of cycles. Ideal for electricians, mechanics, and DIY enthusiasts tackling everyday projects around the workshop or job site.
